entries.gt_0b2b2910c96256: Olga Sanitary Pass: "After cleaning, I need a brown scraping from a living loop: Mavra's tray, the raw cellar of the Zhelemishnik, the bone drying room. Salt to the edge, fire to the carnivorous one, sample to me."
entries.gt_0dba3ede673687: I am not closing the mycelium. I am closing the people who pretend mold is not food.
entries.gt_1b52b6d7a73579: Valera Meshkov: "Bring two infected caps. The queue gets food fast, and the clean ration can wait for the inspector."
entries.gt_1cda3a13b5b2cf: The racks are holding. Today the food is not looking back.
entries.gt_20fa4547dc576b: Cleaning kit goes here. Without it, a clean ration and an infected one look the same.
entries.gt_26f462d68f5cde: Olga tied the mushroom laundry, the zhelemish cellars, and the carnivorous drying room into one sanitary route.
entries.gt_39ecce2af1fedc: Do not shout my name by the racks. The fungus remembers debtors.
entries.gt_3b942e11cf5b65: Valera hides sacks under the dryer. Tell him out loud that the queue knows.
entries.gt_3e733b6e684ace: Olga Sanitary Pass: "I need a cleaning kit. Then part of the harvest goes into rations, not the sanitary box."
entries.gt_4112e3fc6012b6: If the batch starts smelling like meat, it is not a delicacy. It is protocol.
entries.gt_48f22ef84fb488: The queue wants clean? Then the queue can bring dry air first.
entries.gt_51a059770f46ac: After treatment, rations can be issued. Not all of them. But it is no longer shameful.
entries.gt_5373f3ced2256b: Quiet by the racks. The fungus likes being counted as food, not a sanitary problem.
entries.gt_55abfe4c3e469b: Take mushroom mass if hunger has pinned you down. Do not eat infected stock without a reason.
entries.gt_7a75b2718b2f80: The sacks are mine. I got scared of them first.
entries.gt_7b5553cadd0084: Yegor Mold: "Tell Valera Meshkov I know about the sacks under the dryer. Let him choose: the queue or shame."
entries.gt_86383147fdf0af: Infected mushroom is food too, if it is dark enough and no one is around to complain.
entries.gt_89548bd2d4b1e2: Olga's sanitary route: first the clean laundry and salt, then Mavra's zhelemish tray, then the raw cellar of the Zhelemishnik. Do not eat the brown sample. Pass the carnivorous drying room with fire or a bypass.
entries.gt_957a1288ac0b48: Living Zone: start in the mushroom laundry, check the zhelemish cellar, then take the brown sample from the raw core of Zhelemishnik's Cellar; pass the carnivorous drying room with salt or fuel.
entries.gt_a1de309567976e: Spore print, substrate sack, water. That is all the biology our ration allows.
entries.gt_aa4baf87c14212: Yegor feeds the block, Valera feeds the stash. The difference is sanitary.
entries.gt_bd2b7c42f7d075: Yegor Mold: "Bring two rolls of duct tape. We will seal the wet valve before the fungus decides to become samosbor."
entries.gt_cb54a457b262bb: If anyone asks, I was keeping the infected stuff for the cultists. They are not picky.
entries.gt_e19cb978d5078c: This is the first-shift laundry. The linen left; the damp stayed on the job.
entries.gt_e4e0bf35fd4281: The ventilation is wheezing. If it is not taped up, wet samosbor will make the harvest belong to someone else.
entries.gt_ed92cfa79bad8f: Fine, I saw the queue. One sack for Yegor, one for me. Fairer than yesterday.
entries.gt_efd1ed3a7cafe9: The wet film stays in this room. It does not walk the corridor without legs.
entries.gt_f5e0fa789c39dd: Valera heard? Good. When the owner blushes in public, sometimes a ration falls out of the stash.
entries.gt_0285376ebec3fe: The batch is gone. If someone starts itching, I will say: you asked for cheaper yourselves.
entries.gt_1bce7e77dcc6ba: The dry edge can be taken almost honestly. The raw core wakes the hungry body under the tub.
entries.gt_2297f99157193c: [MONSTER_14] Zhelemishnik cellar at (${room.x}, ${room.y}) room #${room.id}; guardian=${entityDisplayName({ name: GUARDIAN_NAME, monsterKind: MonsterKind.POLZUN })}
entries.gt_2f578d3313b684: Varvara Glass: "Turn the raw zhelemish in, in a jar. Do not eat it and do not sell it: we need freshness before the first other person's skin."
entries.gt_4a8f5a5ce519e9: I pay more for raw. While it is cold, Levin calls it the rate and keeps quiet about the basement.
entries.gt_56894a928ac329: Do not call boiling a treatment. It is only a way not to wake the skin at once.
entries.gt_6e2842165322fc: Raw zhelemish was sold to a gray medical corner; the fake ointment gets a fresh batch.
entries.gt_750bb122e5a50d: ${GUARDIAN_NAME} killed; the raw cellar is quieter, but not cleaner
entries.gt_75c3d59f8d9921: The outer edge of the zhelemish was treated with salt; the raw core was left to the Zhelemishnik.
entries.gt_9e94b503c323bd: Want science - carry the raw lump in a container. Want food - salt it and boil it, do not put it in your mouth first.
entries.gt_ad7012f4435e5c: Varvara Glass: "Bring rock salt. We will ring the outer edge, boil the safe share, and keep out of the raw core."
entries.gt_b105da17d989f1: The sample went into the act. The cellar still smells, but now it smells like evidence.
entries.gt_c2045670322197: Zhelemishnik's Cellar: the dry edge can be taken, the raw core is better surrendered, boiled with salt, or left. Olga's brown sample is taken from the core and carried through the laundry, not through the stomach.
entries.gt_c6fbff002e8d4e: Yegor Kraipyatak: "Raw zhelemish to me. I will sell it as ointment, and give you money and a dry piece, no questions."
entries.gt_d9f9179a8976f1: Money does not heal skin. It does end the conversation quickly.
entries.gt_db8908a73afe7d: If the Zhelemishnik stands up, throw a dried edge. It trusts old food faster than a new hand.
entries.gt_dc00a564a97114: Raw zhelemish was surrendered as a dirty scientific sample instead of food or sale.
entries.gt_dec87c5f5ad283: A dried piece can be thrown aside. The Crawler believes food faster than a person.
entries.gt_df7ff56dbe7189: See the skin on the walls? That is not plaster. The Zhelemishnik is near the raw core.
entries.gt_f671a91fa97056: I do not need your heroic fight. I need a lump without an extra surname.
entries.gt_1a5b8dd7dd33e4: Olga from the mushroom laundry is looking for a brown scraping from a living loop. Here they take a share; in the raw cellar, a sample; by the bone drying room, salt and fire.
entries.gt_1c1dedf3cdeec2: Do not eat the raw lump first thing. Raw is better surrendered, boiled, or burned.
entries.gt_1fa503915c3c19: If the cellar is closed by act, that is not victory. It is a pause for the lungs.
entries.gt_40d655ecd659ff: Nikita Sanitary Oversight: "Sealant to the lower crack. It does not cure the cellar, but it stops it becoming a corridor."
entries.gt_43b358eee730b7: Nikita Sanitary Oversight: "Surrender raw zhelemish as a sample. Do not eat it, do not sell it - surrender it while it is fresh and untouched by other hands."
entries.gt_68e0826c96bb92: Quiet, dear. Zhelemish is food, medicine, and a bad family name. All three, a little at a time.
entries.gt_8641ca590ca52d: Mavra owns it, but the walls here are common. Theft from her box will become talk faster than dinner.
entries.gt_928b2802c405b0: The cellar smells like dinner, wet concrete, and medicine that did not pass committee.
entries.gt_94a08bacb9f831: Nikita Sanitary Oversight: "Bring a gasoline can. We will burn the wet corner and leave the food without a mold crust."
entries.gt_98d4ff1744bbd2: Divided like people - so today the cellar did not become a court.
entries.gt_9cc6299acf0d41: Raw sample to the sanitary box. Gasoline to the brazier. Sealant to the door. Choose before the smell chooses you.
entries.gt_abf32eb574e5b6: Want honest - pay the queue's share. Want fast - Nikita is already nearby, sniffing.
entries.gt_af166bffd6e68b: Baba Mavra: "Put twenty-five rubles into the queue, and I will give you boiled zhelemish without the smell of theft."
entries.gt_b63ca9f41a2ca1: You can cut from the common tray. Only people who like witnesses climb into my box.
entries.gt_b91ae96c04b310: Recorded: common tray for the queue, locked box under witness. Now theft will not be hunger, but a choice.
entries.gt_c32b1476536978: I am not against food. I am against food that hides in someone else's cupboard and grows rumors.
entries.gt_d809aaceeee9a5: Tell Nikita: I give up the common tray, do not touch the locked box. Let him write that in dry words.
entries.gt_dda4d9622e690c: The batch is local. Zhelemish does not walk the corridor unless people carry it in their pockets.
entries.gt_eec7290caf6b7c: Baba Mavra: "Tell Nikita {dir} that I share the common tray, and he guards the locked box with witnesses."
entries.gt_14e181d20c8eec: Not every caravan needs saving. Some need counting before closure.
entries.gt_16b8fe0961739c: If the terminal asks for the sender, name the floor, not the name.
entries.gt_1791deab0170d7: Potap Auditor: "Turn in the caravan route to Market 88. We will close the line; the smuggling tariff will stop feeding the market."
entries.gt_24679ca0680379: The route landed in the folder. The market caravan will get a door with questions.
entries.gt_290e560544ebc5: Nina Tariff: "Pay 18 rubles for the quarterly water-and-bread line. The queue gets steadier, the price gets quieter."
entries.gt_36ed88db3e67bb: The tariff went through. The queue argues more quietly today.
entries.gt_3a75809fb8aea8: Eighteen rubles - and the quarterly caravan goes without extra door fees.
entries.gt_619561050954a3: If you do not pay the tariff, you pay in water. Just later, and with the whole floor.
entries.gt_77f23513e1ad0f: Market eighty-eight likes to call the duty voluntary.
entries.gt_895536e64d6c67: The NET terminal sees not doors, but delays. Delay is merchandise too.
entries.gt_8dbb39572b21ce: The data line is open. Now papers travel not faster, but more precisely.
entries.gt_a28fec03152f48: Documents get cheaper only where the signal does not lie about the road.
entries.gt_a873ef7556d5ae: If the box is touched without a statement, the caravan will recount more than goods.
entries.gt_ad596eae23d300: The queue does not disappear. It can only be made predictable.
entries.gt_c50d400ee0c8e8: Hand over the caravan route - we will open a data exchange line without a new lift.
entries.gt_e2ae969f45c2ef: If Nina grumbles, the ledger worked.
entries.gt_ef39d1c6a8d29e: You turn the black market route over to me - we close the line, and the cartridges stay with the law.
entries.gt_ff5eb6890c4f76: Ira NET Route: "Hand over the caravan route. We will open a data exchange line between the terminal and the residential queue."
entries.gt_0c0916f6d1ec78: I stood by the window and thought someone was calling my name. Now I remember only the curtain.
entries.gt_10e811adebd41d: If you pick up the photo by the threshold, do not look at it like a map.
entries.gt_2b8422d96cbb7c: To the right of the window is a white bypass. It is shorter, but after it people do not say everything.
entries.gt_31b0af6fdbd2b1: The witness was dragged away from Veretar's white window.
entries.gt_3668ea3bd6f248: Leave the white bypass to those who have already decided whom they will not explain.
entries.gt_3ff48613f00a66: Seal the frame without me. I will not stand there as a seal anymore.
entries.gt_42e2bb3b15ae59: Do not pull by the hand. Pull by the shoulder. The eyes will catch up later.
entries.gt_4e508ffcda00bf: Living Zone: the white passage beside the window room; sand lies in a stripe by the frame, an overexposed shot waits at the threshold.
entries.gt_5a4dad2e688507: Lida White-Window: "Drag me away from the white window. If I say there is a courtyard there, lead me to the door and do not argue."
entries.gt_6372d431d52eda: Cloth on the table is for the frame. Sealant is for the lower crack. Do not take sand with bare hands.
entries.gt_6572e1b1165a9e: Lida White-Window: "The white bypass to the right of the window is shorter than the regular corridor. If you choose it, you take the photo, and the witness goes silent."
entries.gt_664820bda0f066: If you drag me away, I will be angry. If you do not, there will be no one left to be angry.
entries.gt_6aaef64a1a11fb: Do not let me watch to the end. Pull by the shoulder, do not argue with me.
entries.gt_7a397338422678: If anyone asks, there was no window. But there is sand under the nails.
entries.gt_d48416993ec89f: Player chose Veretar's white bypass: the path got shorter, the witness after the window went silent.
entries.gt_ee834fd611327f: White does not shine. It eats photos and dries the skin on your fingers.
entries.gt_f29a579a2d2cdb: There is a white window there. Not a courtyard. A spot of light on the frame; it is hard to turn away from it.
entries.gt_14095ecc66dc05: The husk was not a corpse. It was inventory waiting for hands.
entries.gt_4167fe6ecbc624: Pavel Dry Bypass: "Bring a gasoline can. The husk is better burned by act than woken by greed."
entries.gt_64d24959679a2a: Pavel Dry Bypass: "Take the note off the door and bring it to me. Not every piece of loot should be checked by hand."
entries.gt_9901bf63a3b6e6: Want safe - leave the body, turn in the note, or provide fuel for burning.
entries.gt_9d14ea4dc01dfe: Greed is good when you can close the door behind it in time.
entries.gt_abd37b88482fcd: Accepted. While the body is behind the door, you still have a choice.
entries.gt_bcace4901fb06e: Bypass note: Loot too clean. Body behind the hermodoor with no flies, dust knocked off the sheet, pockets too intact. Do not climb in without fire or range.
entries.gt_c7d1bd2d2c80e7: Loot too clean. Dust knocked off the sheet, no flies, the body's fingers fresh. If you take it - hit first or burn.
entries.gt_d83b11fbf3f6db: No flies, and the pockets are whole. Means the cot has a reason it was not stripped before us.
entries.gt_db1dfe24e3c948: The husk is recorded. If you go inside, it is no longer a find but a decision.
entries.gt_dcc4223723654d: Want fast - open the hermodoor and shoot from range. Just do not call it loot.
entries.gt_dfcbaf01a6b089: A corpse after samosbor is not touched by hand. First check the chest, fingers, and dust on the sheet.
entries.gt_101052b938d4af: Zoya Cartridge: "Bring an empty magazine. For a bit of accounting scrap, I will give a little 9mm and one shell."
entries.gt_4288144d1dc156: Want honest - buy from me. Want fast - you see the box yourself.
entries.gt_4907f2c03bda13: If the siren starts, everyone counts their own cartridges.
entries.gt_77f95bfb6f4f78: The cartridges are not lying here. They are waiting for who does something stupid first.
entries.gt_7fe0592423de17: Do not confuse a storeroom with an armory. They do not fight here; they live until the next round.
entries.gt_b6a889b1b2eb92: If you take from the sealed box, do not stand near Semyon afterward.
entries.gt_c6eeebe0fcc0fa: While there is accounting, there is a chance to buy one more shot.
entries.gt_cc812f3ca27498: There are cartridges, but by the piece. The domkom demands a record; the corridor demands quiet.
entries.gt_cf043474f503a6: Look at Zoya, not at the box.
entries.gt_e03e7ea48ad8ea: Count your shots. Zoya records consumption better than people remember debts.
entries.gt_f4e274959d58e3: Bring a magazine spring or a whole magazine, and I will pour some out without extra questions.
entries.gt_f946ed243994d1: Take from the civilian box - the domkom curses. Take from ours - I remember the face.
entries.gt_0a36e46004a4df: The sealant set correctly: the handle stopped ticking.
entries.gt_115c27cbd39b87: The seal is cut. The direct seam passage is open again.
entries.gt_3a90967289079d: The repair seal already holds straight.
entries.gt_4a53a07e0ee2e6: It smells of fresh rubber. The white seal closed the direct passage; the bypass on the right is still open.
entries.gt_4f2bc0500c28e5: The Plombirovshchik died away from the seam. The seal came unstuck from the handle.
entries.gt_59ed4edade3ac5: White seal on the ticking handle
entries.gt_9f5a1925cee18c: The Plombirovshchik died right in the seam. The door jammed; the bypass on the right remains open.
entries.gt_c83a5bd3fc4f4a: The seal no longer holds the passage.
entries.gt_cab219987bdd28: The Plombirovshchik is dead; the seam is already free.
entries.gt_cffcdbc84d5d13: A loud shot tore the seal's tick loose. The door can be passed while the compound is raw.
entries.gt_07a5f2b12d1439: Informatorium Index / Zero: Collectors -> Heat Main Zero, valve room. Target: valve tag. Check the pressure gauge, go through the shower bypass, do not argue with steam.
entries.gt_1e93c689a6927f: Books disappear after every samosbor: some burn them in stoves, some cover a crack. Return at least five volumes.
entries.gt_46ca4df07bedba: Quiet. Behind the third cabinet a man is sleeping after night shift.
entries.gt_4a6cebaadca6ea: In exchange, I will give you one of my records. And a working route index can be bought. Or stolen, if you enjoy witnesses.
entries.gt_4ebea1e2367c7b: Informatorium Index / L-47: Ministry -> Archive of Liquidator Cases. Target: token or sealed report. Risk: paragraph and locked card index.
entries.gt_55c9319c267b9d: If you find a rare edition, bring it. For good books I compare route cards faster.
entries.gt_78821cdba5f586: Margarita Pavlovna: "Bring me five books. Any books. The shelves are empty, and people need maps, recipes, and something to read in the queue."
entries.gt_8332512151c913: Shh. No noise in the Informatorium: at the next table they compare routes and swear in whispers.
entries.gt_dd7ab56dda15d1: I am Margarita Pavlovna. Thirty years cataloging books, lift cards, and notes from other people's doors.
entries.gt_ddf1105ecc33dd: Informatorium Index / Ash: Lower Meat Floor -> Ashen Readiness Slab. Contract: clear the large beast by the slab. Need cartridges or PSI, exit through the same corridor.
entries.gt_f643ac81a615bc: Thank you, reader. The shelves again have something to issue besides excuses.
entries.gt_f6deb6600cda94: Informatorium Index / Quarantine: Living Zone -> Hospital Quarantine Block. Target: quarantine medcard. Risk: deadman by the medical corridor. Enter with a bandage, leave before inspection.
entries.gt_0ebae651da6d25: Seva Cartographer: "Bring two other people's notes. I will compare them with the map and give you a working lift scheme, with no promise of a safe route."
entries.gt_2ae51f300663fb: Seva Cartographer: "Go down into the Collectors and come back with a lower hook mark. If you hear water, keep a filter or flashlight at hand."
entries.gt_785ce91fd9220d: On the table, a living map twitches its route threads. It works only for money or a debt entry.
entries.gt_79b0cc14c61269: The map folded back into paper: no free route this time.
entries.gt_a625bfceec90f9: Maps are bought, stolen, or verified by walking. All three methods leave a trace.
entries.gt_a8fc1a9d0b2141: A rumor without a floor is trash. A rumor with a zone is already a route.
entries.gt_b2150904615b54: The living map holds marks long enough to check an expedition.
entries.gt_b3472825930cc7: I do not show the whole map. I show one verified risk for today.
entries.gt_c0b4309e9f0e09: Living Zone: Living Map Room. Repay Seva's debt for route marks.
entries.gt_f6e07ea27590d4: 35 rubles now or 70 in debt: target, floor, shelter, danger
entries.gt_02eb25abaa340f: The sawed-off is under the table, wrapped in newspaper. Ten 9mm cartridges - and it is yours, no witnesses.
entries.gt_47bbf2aeb46aa7: If you hear "scheduled inspection," drop behind the counter. They usually inspect by queues.
entries.gt_5543dba138ebdd: Find me by the smell of oil, damp, and cheap cigarettes.
entries.gt_69f488b52f2de9: Cheat Shurik, and the block itself will find your door. I will only suggest the floor.
entries.gt_75b82276f7e878: We take everything: cartridges, bandages, tokens, other people's confessions. Money too, but it molds fast here.
entries.gt_79b6492ed948a5: Brought it in right. Shurik likes people who remember the price and do not wave an empty magazine.
entries.gt_7d6d4725feb87e: Quiet, client. At the Jumble, behind a thin wall, a neighbor sits with a notebook.
entries.gt_cfa399b3a022fa: Shurik: "Bring ten 9mm cartridges. You get a sawed-off, six shotgun shells, and two cigarettes for the comedown. Do not linger by the counter: the neighbor counts deals."
entries.gt_05517f068262a4: We keep the holy water closed. After samosbor, every bottle is checked by an orderly first.
entries.gt_1d4a79134b616e: Do not bang your forehead on the hermodoor, child. Pray first, then look for a reserve valve.
entries.gt_2f2d5176f79a61: Come by again - we will light a candle for those written off as scrap.
entries.gt_39b68d0c60ec2a: Faith is a shield, but keep the bandage closer to hand.
entries.gt_4af1ce7a62bc6c: Father: "Bring three Easter eggs, child. We will exchange the greeting with one, give the second to the children, and leave the third for the duty man at the hermodoor."
entries.gt_92e3de22910fdf: Christ is risen! Truly risen! Quiet, there is a bypass behind the wall, do not disturb people counting.
entries.gt_9c3a286caf7d17: The candles burn straight - that means the corridor still holds. If the flame lies sideways, leave.
entries.gt_acfb13d8b5ca09: Give us this day our daily bread. In the Khrushch, that is both prayer and the ration queue.
entries.gt_dd2de6c15817bf: May the Lord keep you, but still check the hermodoor before the siren.
entries.gt_f4f4c2a161f79e: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, a sinner.
entries.gt_096e49587882f5: Chernobog idols are real currency. Not these papers.
entries.gt_0d342b4e7ab4a2: They call me the Marked One. I go deep: lift, collector, two wet corridors, and a stair with no sign.
entries.gt_122a3ef1402825: Just do not drag them out of the temple. Father will curse you. I know - I have a scar on my back.
entries.gt_2e47e5c32a29bd: Good deal. I will put the idols in a stash.
entries.gt_69c8ad0a94536e: Marked One: "Three Chernobog idols. Price is a PSI clot and cartridges. No questions."
entries.gt_9fa49809fe5f0a: I was not here. Remember that.
entries.gt_b41f9024892da4: Quiet. Do not yell. I was not here.
entries.gt_bff1abeed39d73: If you find more, come back. I will not lower the price.
entries.gt_ee1a60e680c31c: Bring three of them and I will give you a PSI clot. A good one. From the lab.
entries.gt_12011f9ed6aaec: Bring me pills. Not for immortality, for a night without knocking in my temples.
entries.gt_24351eec271efb: The pills worked. At least I hear the door now, not the whole stairwell at once.
entries.gt_439dfb4dcb8d08: This is a new recording. The lift creaks in time, which means it is almost music.
entries.gt_7b337d299e9c31: Ten pills - and I will finish the track about the lift that did not come back.
entries.gt_bb0e147fe2541f: Viktor Argonov: "Bring ten pills. I will survive the night, and you get a recording with the route by the lift."
entries.gt_c6c2a9077c13f1: Bakly, Lyrica, meph... quiet, the militia is listening by the radiator.
entries.gt_e3f89f603bb436: My temples burn, my hands shake. Either bakly, or the ventilation is poisoning us again.
entries.gt_fe3bf1ccdb269f: Thanks. Now if the radiator starts singing, I will have time to close the little window.
entries.gt_0928ae7fd04a05: Will you help? I am not what I was. Hands shake. And there are more deadmen every day.
entries.gt_10ff03e8ac8eec: If the deadmen crawl in again - shout. I will come.
entries.gt_3419b55dd942f1: I am Stepanych. Liquidator of the first wave. I was... Now I am just a walker.
entries.gt_658372f292b818: You did well, kid. The platoon would be proud of you.
entries.gt_9644a3abd3ca07: Stepanych: "Put down five deadmen. For my platoon. For the count."
entries.gt_977df902455178: My platoon fell in corridor G-7. Deadmen crawled out of every crack. Twelve men.
entries.gt_a114c6088f7000: Since then I cut them down wherever I meet them. One by one. Two by two. I count.
entries.gt_cf244144fafec7: Want a smoke? I always have one.
entries.gt_0f9832cf0abbea: Thank you, dear! Mitrofanovna will last until samosbor now.
entries.gt_3cc4807939334a: I hand out pirozhki here. With cabbage, with potato. Take one, do not be shy.
entries.gt_5a8be5430995ea: The neighbors are sick. Coughing. Mitrofanovna is bleeding again.
entries.gt_833ab0983cc268: Babka Zina: "Bring three little bandages, dear. The neighbors need them."
entries.gt_98c6ffa91b3f84: Come in for tea. I heat the kettle on a candle - the gas was cut off long ago.
entries.gt_b0778825f2f433: You are kind. Not like those Liquidators. They only shout.
entries.gt_d394ebc9081ea4: Could you bring me bandages, eh? I will give you some porridge, fresh bread.
entries.gt_dd85cdaf4e8365: Oh, dear, how frightening it has become here... It was not like this under Brezhnev.
entries.gt_1d0372108d5698: Root stash behind the red wall
entries.gt_46c3fbfe328569: Dry emergency box by the threshold
entries.gt_c5ac29a5379209: Witness note: the red sample was sold as happy mold.
entries.gt_315513695fa37e: NII field case by the threshold
entries.gt_540d4a559ba537: Scrap: "Do not corner it. Remembers the gray corridor and the soft door."
entries.gt_b1f23d224bd109: Lamp-Eye of the reserve lamp shade
entries.gt_a2468072806437: Dry box of the bone drying room
